Home.villasIntro: Three distinct experiences, each with immersive 360° virtual tours.
Home.amenitiesIntro: Everything you need for an unforgettable stay, included with every villa.
Home.reviewsIntro: Real reviews from guests who experienced {resortName}.
Home.locationCopy: Perched on the hillside overlooking the Gulf of Thailand, {resortName} is minutes from pristine beaches, world-class diving, and vibrant local markets. Yet once inside our gates, the world falls away.
Home.readyCopy: Book direct and save 15% compared to online travel agencies. Includes complimentary airport transfer and welcome amenities.

Booking.demoReadyNotice: Demo booking mode is ready. Connect Convex to check live availability.
Booking.demoSeedNotice: Live inventory is not seeded yet, so demo booking mode is active.
Booking.demoUnavailableNotice: Live availability is temporarily unavailable, so demo booking mode is active.
Booking.chooseDates: Choose your arrival and checkout dates.
Booking.selectCheckout: Select a checkout date to complete your stay.
Booking.guestDetailsIntro: Please enter the contact details the host should use for this reservation.
Booking.fullNameHint: Use the same name you will use at check-in. Example: Maya Chen.
Booking.phoneError: Enter a phone or WhatsApp number with at least 6 digits.
Booking.livePaymentNote: Your booking will be checked once more before payment.
Booking.demoPaymentNote: Demo payment will not create a live booking.
Booking.notAvailable: {propertyName} is not available for part of this stay. Please choose another villa or date range.
Booking.notAvailableShort: {propertyName} is not available for those dates. Pick another villa or change dates.
Booking.completeBeforePayment: Please complete valid dates and guest details before payment.
Booking.liveBookingUnavailable: Live booking is not available for this villa. Please refresh and try again.
Booking.datesNoLongerAvailable: These dates are no longer available. Please choose different dates.
Booking.unableToCreate: Unable to create booking. Please try again.
Booking.demoPaymentCopy: Demo checkout keeps the booking flow testable locally. No real card is charged.
Booking.livePaymentCopy: Live payment is confirmed by a trusted payment webhook, not by this browser page.
Booking.liveVerificationUnavailable: Live booking verification is unavailable. Please try again when the booking service is connected.
Booking.successVerificationUnavailable: Live booking verification is unavailable. Please keep your payment reference and contact the host.
Booking.missingToken: This booking link is missing its secure access token.
Booking.missingConfirmationToken: This confirmation link is missing its secure access token.
Booking.secureCheckoutOnly: Live payment confirmation is handled by secure checkout. Please use the host payment link or contact the concierge.
Booking.confirmedCopy: Your reservation request is confirmed. The host can follow up with arrival details, airport pickup, and any special requests.
Booking.notConfirmedCopy: We could not verify a paid booking from this link.

Chat.intro: I can help pick the right villa, explain direct booking savings, or point you into the 360 tour.
Chat.name: Name
Chat.bookingCardHelper: Pick dates here and continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptReady: Perfect. Use the booking card below to review the villa and dates, then continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingVillaAndDates: Happy to help. Use the booking card below to choose a villa plus check-in and checkout dates.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingVilla: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose the villa, then continue to secure booking.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingDates: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose check-in and checkout dates.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingCheckIn: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose your check-in date.
Chat.bookingPromptMissingCheckOut: Almost there. Use the booking card below to choose your checkout date.
Chat.suggestionCouple: Which villa is best for a couple?
Chat.answerCouple: The Garden Suite is the quietest couples' retreat. If you want more space and your own pool, the Pool Villa is the indulgent step-up.
Chat.answerDirect: Direct booking saves around 15% versus OTA pricing and keeps support with the host. Airport pickup, welcome amenities, and direct WhatsApp help are the big wins.
Chat.suggestion360: Can I see the villa in 360?
Chat.answer360: Yes. Open any villa card or detail page and choose Explore 360. You can move room to room with hotspots and finish directly into booking.
Chat.noConvex: I can help compare villas here, and live chat will connect once Convex is configured for this Next.js app.
Chat.fallback: Please try again, or contact us below.
Chat.sent: I sent that to the concierge. Please use WhatsApp if you need an immediate reply.
